title: Departmental Results Reports: Environment and Climate Change Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Departmental Results Reports: Environment and Climate Change Canada
Departmental Results Report (DRR), formerly Departmental Performance Reports (DPR) are primary instruments of accountability to Parliament. They are individual departmental and agency accounts of the results that they achieved against the expected results that they identified in their corresponding departmental plans. DRRs are tabled each fall by the President of the Treasury Board on behalf of the responsible ministers.
